scripts.build: npm run build -w @matra/core && npm run build -w @matra/command && npm run build -w @matra/math && npm run build -w @matra/math-compute-engine && npm run build -w @matra/graphics && npm run build -w @matra/html && npm run build -w @matra/kernel
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run check --workspaces --if-present
